title: TerriblyOptimized
description: The TerriblyOptimized Modpack is meant to provide the same optimization as popular optimization modpacks, while providing essential QoL features that every player needs.
body:
Installation
The TerriblyOptimized modpack aims to provide a base of the best optimization mods available, configured for the maximum performance achievable. This has been made possible through the use of the [SimplyOptimized modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop). On top of SO, I have hand-selected some of the best Quality of Life (QoL) mods to go along with it, making the modpack both practical and useful. This also means it can update to new Minecraft versions in a matter of hours or minutes and sometimes has versions for snapshots! Additionally, it's quick to recieve mod updates with new cutting-edge performance improvements. I strive to keep the pack as relevant as it can be at any given moment. **If you have any questions, or would like me to release TO for a specific Minecraft version, please DM me on Discord (@aftoncodes).**
Included mods (25)
  • AppleSkin by squeek502
  • bad packets by deirn
  • Cloth Config API by shedaniel
  • Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric) by ishland
  • Debugify by isxander
  • Dynamic FPS by juliand665
  • Entity Culling by tr7zw
  • Fabric API by modmuss50
  • FerriteCore by malte0811
  • ImmediatelyFast by RaphiMC
  • Iris Shaders by coderbot
  • Lithium by jellysquid3
  • Mod Menu by Prospector
  • ModernFix by embeddedt
  • MoreCulling by fxmorin
  • No Chat Reports by Aizistral
  • Not Enough Crashes by natanfudge
  • Simple Voice Chat by henkelmax
  • Sodium by jellysquid3
  • ThreadTweak by getchoo
  • Very Many Players (Fabric) by ishland
  • Wurst-Imperium Zoom (WI Zoom) by Alexander01998
  • What The Hell Is That? (WTHIT) by deirn
  • Xaero's Minimap by thexaero
  • YetAnotherConfigLib by isxander
Note: The mod **WI Zoom** originates from the code of the Wurst Hacked Client. There is **no hacks** in TremendouslyOptimized, as only the Zoom module of Wurst is inside of WI Zoom.
